Package model

Class Account

java.lang.Object
model.Account
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Account extends Object implements Serializable
Account class that represents the user's account tracks longest streak, current streak, high score, current score and points.
See Also:

      password - String that represents the account password

      public void setPassword(String newPassword)
      setPassword sets the account password
      Parameters:

      newBack - : String that represents the new background to set

      newBack - : String that represents the new card back

    • verifyPassword

      public Boolean verifyPassword(String passAttempt)
      verifyPassword verify that the supplied password matches the account recorded password.
      Parameters:
      passAttempt - String that represents the user's attempted password
      Returns:
      Boolean true if password was valid false otherwise.

    • setMatch

      public void setMatch(Boolean match)
      setMatch updates hadMatch field to track matches and non matches
      Parameters:
      match - Boolean value that will be assigned to hadMatch

    • updateCurrScore

      public void updateCurrScore()
      updateCurrScore uses current Boolean value assigned to hadMatch to determine if current score, points, and streak need to be updated or if current streak needs to be reset

      public void win()

      withdrawPoints : updates points to reflect a withdraw of points.
